name: unified-unit-economics
description: BI as Code Pipeline for Crumble

scripts.build: uv venv && uv pip install -r requirements.txt && .venv/bin/python data_gen/generate_data.py && cd dbt_project && ../.venv/bin/dbt deps --profiles-dir . && ../.venv/bin/dbt build --profiles-dir . && cd .. && evidence sources && evidence build
